title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_174.txt
raw_text: past is altered retroactively. {Note} This simply must explain my sense of just having been in a cool, high, moist climate, as well as my personality change + verbal mannerisms (dog he, cat she, the car air vent). The present was now as if certain events in the past had not occurred; thus the present changed (released from the causal karma of these past events). + even though I could watch it (reality) melt, I could not remember how it had just now been (different). But I knew it had. {Note:} No, it is not. The present is altered as if those past events had not occurred. The past events occurred, all right, but their causal trains to the present were modulated so the result in the present was as if they -the events- had not been. The present is disjunctive from the past: folder 48 - 193 folder 48 - 193 this is the revivification of creation. The "new heavens + new Earth" - cut off from the past. "+ the memory of the former things..." etc. __ Here's a really bizarre idea. Thomas is me as I'd have been if the tragedies of 1970-1974 hadn't happened to me. This is why my memory of those specific years suddenly became dim; + I remembered a different car; didn't know the dog was a she, + the cat he. That period -1970-1974- was not retroactively changed, but I in March 1974 when I became Thomas I became what I'd have been if I'd lived otherwise from 1970 to 1974. No change was made before 1970, though, so books I wrote seem syntonic to me - in contra-distinction to "The Dark-Haired Girl." This is the burning up of karma, the destroying the supremecy of the past: this is the Xtian rebirth, born the 2nd time: disjunctive from the past, i.e. ananke, + hence not at its mercy - cut off from it. The true death-crisis, then, is the accumulation of the past - which is to say, the script that leads to death because death is as much in the person as in outside circumstances. (1) The lethal outside circumstance must be changed; in my case the Xerox missive handled, but also (2) the inner death-analog must be destroyed. So 2 tapes require amending, not just the outer one in folder 48 - 194 folder 48 - 194 the external world, death is carried within the person, also. So his death strip is edited out by a sort of psycho surgery. I was changed so that I no longer contained the death strip, which focused on the years 1970-1974. Thomas was me without the death-strip. __ Sudden thought: "Instilled an anti-Pigspurt personality in me + then tested it out." Possibility: my normal personality is fugal. Under extreme pressure the fugal personality retreated as far as possible - this personality took over in 1970 when I took the mescalin. It was psychotic if fugal = psychotic. Then a non-fugal self ("Thomas") took over in 2-3-74 when the fugal one could retreat no further; i.e. sufficient pressure made me sane because I could retreat no farther. The key term is: coming to grips with; i.e. facing reality, not evading it. In 2-3-74 my problems could no longer be evaded; hence the epiphany of Thomas. Fugue, as a way (device for) of handling reality broke down. (Heidegger's inauthentic way of Being.) The fugal personality was always high. Auto-intoxicated-evasive. Or rather, intoxicated by the amphetamines + then going into up-down cyclythemia, neither phase being related to reality. Both phases were turned inward. The hawk + the Mater Dolorosa. Driven mad by 1) Nancy leaving; + 2) drugs; + 3) endogenous psychosis. Thomas, not having been conscious in decades or ever before, saw reality folder 48 - 195 folder 48 - 195 without coagulated hypostases: i.e. lucidly. So what he saw (Valis, the plasmate) was the way reality really is (set-ground). A self that formed in my unconscious, I guess. Collective unconscious. Valis is real; the blood (plasmate) is real too. I can trust what Thomas saw; an adult brain with a newborn baby's perceptions. Thomas represents a central-vision self; I represent a fugitive peripheral-vision self. He concentrates on the real; I evade it. He is methodical; I am herky-jerky. Then the Bardo Thodol trip in 3-74 was me running (fleeing) faster + faster until that self consumed itself utterly: ran out of time + space. Thomas calibrated time + space on another scale entirely, since he runs through neither. He stands still. Thus he sees what really is there. Thomas knows all the stuff on which e.g. "Ubik" + "Tears" are based. __ (1) The "heavenly Torah" as informational basis of reality. (2) The dialectic, which constitutes a binary computer flip-flop //\\//\\. (3) The "resetting" that I saw + called Valis - these three elements point - + (4) our media cooked. (5) The presence of information everywhere - i.e. the plasmate. (6) The inner + outer tapes. (7) What seems to have been a reprogramming in 3-74. (1) + (2) considered alone - (7) is a nullifying of (1) + - override of (1) as it manifests itself as (6). What we have here is a high-speed program based on info fed into the system. Info that can be folder 48 - 196 amended or even nullified. (8) Set to ground. Set is info, alive, that has been fed into the system (considered here as ground), + controls. It determines the direction of the program. But, apparently, the programmer has microformed itself + entered the system to control it from here, rather than outside the system. There comes to my mind those temperature gauges plunged to the core of a cooking roast to determine its temperature; it can act as a feedback system modulating the heat from the source, increasing or decreasing it. ___ What are the chances of (1) the heavenly Torah fed into creation as formula; + (2) the computer-like dialectic, suggesting a high speed binary system? The mind either governing this or its mind (the system's mind, if it has one) merged with mine in 3-74 as it took me over. Is it possible that the override ("Christ") enters to correct the direction of the system when it veers from "the formula" thus not correctly moving toward the formula's envisioned outcome? "I come not to abolish the law but to fulfill it" - i.e. "I am the law." Drift. That's the key word: drift. As well as ossification + entropy. Drift is measured from within the system. I know that it controls everything within the system but it does override, but this does not necessarily point to anything but a correction to cause a return to the formula. But Christ is not lodged in the system; he has become the folder 48 - 197 folder 48 - 197 the system. He mimics the system, camouflaged. He is an invader, growing + spreading, replacing more + more of the system. ("Felix culpa.") Set combats ground - the "intersection of two information systems," as I once termed it, with the smart one (Sophia) winning. Is he wiser than the formula? An improvement over it? Hence: new information that oblit No. It cooks the old (i.e. the Torah) exactly as our media is cooked. It cuts in, + not from outside the system; it (as new information) arises from within the system. This is the secret ("Christ in us"). It's not {illustration: An arrow from "Torah" to "System" is affected by an arrow from "Christ"} It's {illustration: An arrow from "Torah" to "System", and "System" is affected by "Christ" from within} Thus this is the dialectic. The formula enters from outside + is amended -cooked- by Christ as the system; hence Paul in Galacians could see the law as bad, + its "elemental powers stripped of their ancient authority" by Christ. The Torah ran the system from outside, but Christ is here. He has brought the system to sentient life. The plasmate that I saw is not the Torah but rather Christ's blood. This makes the system totally homeostatic. What 3-74 showed me is that the divine is here. But this isn't pantheism. The divine has come here (Valis as invader) + renders decisions (as judge) on the spot. From within the system. Overpowering the ancient law. folder 48 - 198 folder 48 - 198 __ 4:30 AM hypnagogic: If the messenger arrives in time with the white -i.e. blank- document, your punishment is abolished. I.e. the blank white paper is substituted -intervenes- for the bill of particulars that lists the sins (or crimes) for which you are being tried + punished. If the messenger arrives in time. I get the impression that the messenger is Christ. Viz: {Illustration: undulating arrow "Charges against you" has a blank paper "inserted" and a straight arrow leads to "trial"} The record is cleared by this exculpatory intervention, but it must occur before sentence is carried out; time is of the essence. I get the impression that the list of sins (crimes) are in relation to the law + involve a rigid karmic system of retributive "eye for an eye." The charges have piled up. Suddenly it occurs to me that this may not only have to do with divine punishment in some afterlife, but the karmic accrual in this life! Of course; 3-74. Christ the messenger got to me -reached me- in 2-74, just before sentence was exacted on the basis of the charges. The deterministic system can only be shorted out this way. White document -i.e. nothing written on it- would be the spotless lamb -v. Luther and the doctrine of vicarious atonement- but also eschatological judge; messenger as - yes; as in electronic circuit! Charges: sins + crimes you are guilty of: constituting bill of particulars {Illustration: undulating arrow "Info input" has a blank paper inserted and the straight arrow "No info input" leads to "Karmic payoff"} folder 48 - 199 folder 48 - 199 What I saw is clearly a cybernetics info system. Upon the insertion of the blank white -i.e. spotless- document (which resembles a card) there is no passage of info to the receiver which constitutes your punishing mechanism; it is told no charges. Viz: {Illustration: undulating arrow "Info rich" has a "Blank" paper inserted and the straight arrow "Hence blank. No info" leads to y: "Punishment based on info" and "No punishment since no info to act on."} Or rather: {illustrations: A) undulating arrow leads to y: "Trial + punishment based on info input" B) undulating arrow "Sound" has a "Blank" paper inserted and the straight arrow "Silence" leads to y: "Trial + punishment finding no acct of misdeeds" B) = undulating arrow stops before "Blank" paper inserted, and the straight arrow "Silence" comes from above and leads to y: "Trial + punishment finding no acct of misdeeds" } The blank white document contains no instructions, orders or information, so it must be -can only be- used as substitute (for the info-signal input). If, as in (A), info reaches y, it inexorably acts on it; it makes no decisions, no judgments; its response is mechanical. The only way to abort or abolish its punitive reaction is to keep the info (signal) from reaching it. Think of the person involved as a computer punch card with info in it, + Christ as a perfectly clean info-less card. Clearly, it is the Torah involved here. folder 48 - 200 folder 48 - 200 Ah! The messenger's blank document when inserted between the list of your sins/crimes + the retributive "court" acts as an interrupter component introduced into a signal circuit. + being blank it is a squelch type of interrupter, rather than a noise or scrambler interrupter; it erases the signal-flow - not the signal but the flow (transmission). The fact that a messenger brings it shows that this is not an illegal interruption; he has the authority to do this (as in
